agent.name: Juicer-Antigravity-Agent
agent.description: Autonomous developer agent for Juicer macOS application

rules: Always check codex.md before committing changes.
Use lowercase commit messages in format `xxx: xxx xxx xxx`.
Run `xcodegen generate` after creating or deleting files.
Keep local LLM workloads capped at 7B/8B parameters to maintain 16GB RAM efficiency.
